rows.label: tlk43100246_01_msg0001
rows.name:
I'm starting to get tired
of fishing... But I've already
tried most free pastimes...

rows.label: tlk43100246_01_msg0002
rows.name:
I'm from Torika Alley, me. We don't
get a lot of toys round there.

rows.label: tlk43100246_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Only real fun thing we get
to enjoy is Bajena Playhouse!
It's just up the stairs.

rows.label: tlk43100246_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Kids can get in for free
once a month in there!

rows.label: tlk43100246_01_msg0005
rows.name:
A month's a long time
to wait though...
